Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Off Calendar

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ANGELO FERRO and FERRO AUTOMOTIVE GROUP, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on the motion to change venue. Judge: Marla J. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL SCHEIBER OF BRACAMONTES & VLASAK, TEL. NO. 835-6777 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARIE TRIMBLE HOLVICK OF GORDON & REES LLP, TEL. NO. 986-5900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ANGELO FERRO and FERRO AUTOMOTIVE GROUP, INC.'s Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Sanctions. Motion for change of venue is Granted (CCP 395.5.). Venue is proper in Solano County. Defendant Ferro Automotive Group's principal place of business is 2501 Martin Road, Fairfield, California, which is located in Solano County. (Holvick Decl., Exhibit A.) The meeting minutes are not dispositive. There is no evidence that the San Francisco address was ever submitted to the Secretary of State as the principal place of business. The address of the agent for service of process is not relevant. Both sides' requests for attorneys fees and costs pursuant to CCP 396b are denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
